one_time_description: Long Plain First Nation Trust - TLE (Treaty Land Entitlement) revenue of $7,052,534 recognized in year
economic_notes: Arrowhead Development Corporation (consolidated with 6089292 Manitoba Ltd., Keeshkeemaquah Hotels Inc., Keeshkeemaquah Limited Partnership, and Ado Aki Inc.) is the government business enterprise. Hotel under construction in Winnipeg with $7.7M restricted cash. Irrigation Management Company Ltd. also operated. COVID-19 impacted operations including closures and staff layoffs.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022. Large TLE (Treaty Land Entitlement) revenue of $7,052,534 is a significant one-time item. Net debt position of $50,646,417 largely driven by major hotel construction project in Winnipeg ($19.7M construction in progress, $7.7M restricted cash for hotel). Arrowhead Development Corporation is accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Long Plain First Nation is located in Manitoba. Deferred revenue balance not separately stated on balance sheet in the extracted text. Long-term debt balance not extractable from provided text. Tangible capital assets net book value not available in extracted text. The statement of financial position liabilities section was not fully provided in the text.
